zh.lifeSummary: Janet Glendening是Sir Simon Glendonwyn -of Parton和Mary Douglas的女兒，出生在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾維斯特爾吉可。她於1400年與(Nobleman) Gilbert Grierson在蘇格蘭度福利爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1412年11月14日在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Janet Glendening是Sir Simon Glendonwyn -of Parton和Mary Douglas的女儿，出生在英国苏格兰度福利爾維斯特爾吉可。她于1400年与(Nobleman) Gilbert Grierson在苏格兰度福利爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1412年11月14日在英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里。

nameMeanings.name: Glendening
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Glendenning
meanings: Scottish (Dumfriesshire and Lanarkshire): habitational name from Glendinning in the parish of Westerkirk, Dumfriesshire. It is probably named from Welsh glyn ‘valley’ + din ‘fort’ + gwyn ‘fair, white’.

nameMeanings.name: Janet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

variants.name: Jannet
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Janet Glendening was born in Westerkirk, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom as the daughter of Sir Simon Glendonwyn -of Parton and Mary Douglas. She married (Nobleman) Gilbert Grierson in 1400, in Dumfriesshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died on 14 November 1412, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Janet Glendening est née à Westerkirk, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, fille de Sir Simon Glendonwyn -of Parton et Mary Douglas. Elle a épousé (Nobleman) Gilbert Grierson en 1400, à Dumfriesshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée le 14 novembre 1412, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Janet Glendening wurde in Westerkirk, Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Sir Simon Glendonwyn -of Parton und Mary Douglas geboren. Sie hat 1400 in Dumfriesshire, Scotland (Nobleman) Gilbert Grierson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb am 14. November 1412 in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Janet Glendening è nata il nel Westerkirk, Dumfriesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito come figlia di Sir Simon Glendonwyn -of Parton e Mary Douglas. Lei sposato (Nobleman) Gilbert Grierson nel 1400, nel Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì il 14 novembre 1412, nel Salisbury, Wiltshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Janet GlendeningはイギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアウエステルキルクでSir Simon Glendonwyn -of PartonとMary Douglasの娘として生まれた。1400年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアで(Nobleman) Gilbert Griersonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1412年11月14日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Janet Glendening(은)는 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르 웨스터커크에서 Sir Simon Glendonwyn -of Parton(와)과 Mary Douglas의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1400년 스컷랜드 드프리실르에서 (Nobleman) Gilbert Grierson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1412년 11월 14일 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Janet Glendening nasceu em Westerkirk, Dumfriesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom filha de Sir Simon Glendonwyn -of Parton e Mary Douglas. Ela casou-se com (Nobleman) Gilbert Grierson em 1400, em Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu em 14 de novembro de 1412, em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Janet Glendening родилась в местности вестиркирк, думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания. Её родителей звали Sir Simon Glendonwyn -of Parton и Mary Douglas. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени (Nobleman) Gilbert Grierson в 1400 г. в местности думфриессхир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла 14 ноября 1412 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Janet Glendening nació en Westerkirk, Dumfriesshire, Escocia, Reino Unido como hija de Sir Simon Glendonwyn -of Parton y Mary Douglas. Se casó con (Nobleman) Gilbert Grierson en 1400, en Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió el 14 de noviembre de 1412, en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.
